en: Enough! I don't want to hear any more.
Enough talking — let other people speak.
Enough from you! You know what I mean.
Enough from you! You know what I mean.
The water isn't enough for everyone.
Did you sleep enough last night?

text: ما نمت كفاية، حاسس حالي تعبان.
en: I didn't sleep enough, I feel tired.

text: ما نمت كفاية، حاسّة حالي تعبانة.
en: I didn't sleep enough, I feel tired.

text: أكلت كفاية؟ — لأ، بدي شوي كمان.
en: Did you eat enough? — No, I want a little more.
I worked enough today, time to rest.
